3092690.name: NSFW Solitaire - SFW Card Set Pack
3092690.description:
87 legacy SFW card sets that are now part of my other app Free Solitaire.

If you find yourself playing with SFW content only, I suggest switching to Free Solitaire. It has SFW audio and much more SFW content in its own DLCs.

Topics:

  • anime - girls, fantastic creatures, cute characters

  • art

  • fantasy - creatures, beasts, characters

  • for kids - cute animals

  • photos - cats, dogs, horses, other animals, flowers, landscapes, vehicles

  • standard card sets - variations of Vegas, Russian, French, 1990s pixelated
3092690.supported_languages: 英语, 俄语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 波兰语, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲, 克罗地亚语, 塞尔维亚语, 法语, 德语, 日语, 简体中文, 繁体中文, 韩语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙
